title: cytisus albus var. microphyllus
intro: Cytisus albus var. microphyllus, commonly known as dwarf or rock broom, is a small shrub that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cytisus albus var. microphyllus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
